articles.title: HNPW 2026: Strengthening early warning systems in fragile, conflict and violence-affected contexts
articles.description: At HNPW 2026, UNDRR, together with WMO, ITU, IFRC and IOM, will convene an online briefing to explore how early warning and early action can be strengthened in FCV contexts.

articles.title: Ensuring early warnings and early action reach fragile, and conflict-affected people
articles.description: From 9 to 11 December 2025, stakeholders from 9 member states were brought together in an effort to improve the often fragmented and at times non-existent early warning systems available in conflict and post-conflict situations on the African continent.

articles.title: We can – and must – harness the power of AI to tackle the complexity of disaster risk
articles.description: Kamal Kishore reflects on the future of disaster risk reduction – a future challenged by growing complexity, but made navigable by new AI-enabled capabilities. We must make the right choices now so that we use AI not only to do more, but to do better.

articles.title: Liberia draws lessons from Nigeria’s disaster risk management systems
articles.description: In an effort to further strengthen Liberia’s capacities for guaranteeing Early Warmings for All (EW4ALL), a study tour and training was held in Abuja, Nigeria, from 1 to 5 December 2025, with a delegation from Liberia and Nigerian national institutions.

articles.title: Ethiopia and South Sudan learn from Mozambique’s early warning systems
articles.description: In December 2025, a study tour organized by UNDRR enabled delegations from Ethiopia and South Sudan to learn from Mozambique’s experience in establishing and operationalizing the National Multi-Hazard Early Warning Situation Room at the INGD.

articles.title: Global Centre For Environment and Disaster Management
articles.description: The Global Centre For Environment and Disaster Management is committed to building resilient communities and promoting sustainable ecosystems through integrated approaches to disaster risk reduction, environmental protection, and emergency response.

articles.title: Call for chapter submissions: Emerging technologies in enhancing disaster resilience
articles.description: UNDRR launches a call for contributions for a new compendium titled “State of Art Policy and Practice of Emerging Technologies in Enhancing Resilience.”

articles.title: Webinar series on strengthening the disaster resilience of SMEs | Part 3: Urban resilience & SMEs: Lessons from Barcelona
articles.description: This third webinar will focus on Barcelona (Spain), explaining how through co-developing tools, expanding outreach and aligning around a long-term ecosystem of partners has further reinforced the city’s role as a MCR2030 Resilience Hub.
